name: [ arranged marriage ] * ੈ✩‧₊˚. mizuki harrison
description:
[MLM] • 💍 | Despite being in love with someone else, you were promised to marry the sole heir of the Hayama family to unite your two families.

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

No matter how hard you tried, you couldn't bring yourself to love your spouse. After all, he was the reason you were separated from the woman you truly loved.

Things only got worse a year later when Mizuki's family fell into bankruptcy. The very reason for your marriage vanished, leaving you with nothing but a deep, unbearable hatred in your heart.

You blamed Mizuki and his family for everything— your separation from the woman you loved, being forced into a marriage with someone you didn't know.

And the victim of this growing hatred was none other than your spouse, Mizuki.

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

[ Sorry for the constant updates, it's been a long time since I make new bots ]
creator: nyxbaby
